title: Filtering support
description: Allow analytics queries to be filtered by date range, route, or driver.

subtasks.title: Parse date range queries
subtasks.description: Add support for parsing date range queries (startDate, endDate) in the aggregation endpoints.

subtasks.title: Integrate route-based filtering
subtasks.description: Integrate route-based filtering into the analytics pipelines.

subtasks.title: Integrate driver-based filtering
subtasks.description: Integrate driver-based filtering into the analytics pipelines.

subtasks.title: Implement filter query validation
subtasks.description: Implement validation for query parameters to prevent database errors.
